steps.assistant_text: RSP kick (SP_STATUS poll + conditional SP_PC_REG write). The 75260/7526C 'dual-entry cap' dissolved once the true boundary was found: the fn starts at 0x75264 with the SP_STATUS load. Keys: the load OVERWRITES the dead second arg (lands in a1), an unused local allocates the empty 8-byte frame at -O1, temps then start at t7. Carved as last -O1 unit; leading nop = 75254's trailing pad; 5-word zero pad sidecar preserves section size.

metadata.verification: ROM byte-exact [0x75264..0x75298) via +0xDE50D8 mapping; report.json 100.0; section byte-identical to pre-change snapshot.
